tablist._doc_enabled: Set to true to enable the custom tablist header/footer system. False restores vanilla tablist.
tablist._doc_refreshInterval: How often the tablist header/footer is updated, in ticks. 20 ticks = 1 second. Lower = smoother animation but more network traffic.
_doc_header: The text displayed ABOVE the player list.
Supports an array of strings for animated frames (each frame shown for refreshInterval ticks).
Use a single string for a static header.
Colour codes: use & followed by the code (0-9, a-f, k, l, m, n, o, r).
{online}        — online player count (respects vanish hide setting)
_doc_footer: The text displayed BELOW the player list.
Same array animation and placeholder support as header.
_doc_playerFormat: How each player's name appears in the player list rows.
This controls the display name shown next to the player's head in the tablist.
tablist._doc_hideVanished: When true, vanished players are hidden from the {online} count and from other players' tablists. Players with 'neoessentials.vanish.see' still see vanished players.
tablist._doc_showAfkIndicator: When true, AFK players have the afkSuffix appended to their name in the tablist.
tablist._doc_afkSuffix: The text appended to AFK players' names in the tablist. Supports colour codes with &.
_doc_groupColors: Optional: per-group colour overrides for player names in the tablist.
If a player's group matches a key here, their name in the tablist is prefixed with that colour code.
Leave empty ({}) to use the default playerFormat only.
_doc_layout_examples: --- Example: Animated frames (cycles every refreshInterval ticks) ---
